meta.title: It’s Not About Consequences. It’s About Connection.
meta.description:
This Unsolicited Response wasn’t about tools or exploits. It was about what actually moves security forward.

Build real relationships. Know your stakeholders beyond the org chart. Then be bold enough to tell them the hard truths anyway.

Cybersecurity is about protecting people. Start by talking to them like one.
